resumeText:
Summary
Data engineer focused on SQL, Python, Airflow, and Redshift.
Skills
SQL
Python
Airflow
Redshift
Experience
Built ELT pipelines in Python and SQL for finance reporting workloads.

jobDescriptionText: We are hiring a Data Engineer. Must have SQL, Python, Airflow, and Snowflake. Build reliable pipelines and improve warehouse quality.
